steps.title: Match the present description
steps.content: The passage describes a current, repeated feature of the sculpture: each night, a lamp inside the tree-shaped structure lights the glass. The surrounding verbs “is bathed” and “is” point to simple present tense.

steps.title: Avoid tense shifts
steps.content: Choice A shifts to future progressive tense. Choice C is conditional, and Choice D shifts to past tense. The sentence needs a simple present-tense verb for the lamp's regular function. The answer is B.
